name: dyscalculia-support-skill
description: Comprehensive dyscalculia support system treating dyscalculia as a neurodevelopmental cognitive disorder (not merely a learning disability) with brain-based numerical processing deficits centered on the intraparietal sulcus. Implements CRA (Concrete-Representational-Abstract) methodology, cognitive bypass strategies, and standards compliance across three legal jurisdictions: United States (IDEA, Section 504, NCTM, ADA workplace), France (Loi n° 2005-102, Code de l'éducation Art. L321-4, PAP/PPS via MDPH/CDAPH, aménagements d'examens with calculatrice across all exams, RQTH for workplace), and Spain (LOE/LOMLOE Art. 71/72/79 bis, ACNEAE/DEA framework with discalculia under DEA, ACNS pathway, EBAU/EvAU exam adaptations, 17-Comunidad-Autónoma regional variation, RDL 1/2013 for workplace). Grounded in Butterworth core deficit theory and intraparietal sulcus research, with locale-aware adaptations for French number-word irregularities (soixante-dix, quatre-vingts) and Spanish transparent base-10 system (regular -enta suffix).
author: Justice

skills.name: Standards Compliance
skills.description: Audit educational content against NCTM Principles & Standards, IDEA and Section 504 requirements (US), Loi 2005-102 / PAP / PPS / Circulaire 2023-033 (France), LOE/LOMLOE / ACNEAE / DEA / ACNS (Spain), and ADA Title I / RQTH / RDL 1/2013 (workplace layer across jurisdictions). Identifies gaps in universal design principles and provides locale-aware compliance recommendations.

skills.name: Gap Analysis
skills.description: Analyze student mathematical understanding across number sense domains. Identifies specific deficits in concrete-representational-abstract progression and foundational competencies. Cross-linguistic analysis surfaces locale-specific gaps: French number-word irregularities (soixante-dix/quatre-vingts) compounding transcoding deficits, Spanish-language assessment tool availability (TEDI-MATH ES, PROCALCULO), French Bilan orthophonique vs Spanish orientador-led pathways.

skills.name: Remediation Strategies
skills.description: Generate CRA-based remediation plans with concrete manipulatives, representational models, and abstract symbol work. Customizable by student anxiety level, duration, intensity, and comorbidities. Locale-aware adaptations: French intervention via orthophoniste with explicit attention to irregular number-word transcoding (60-99 range); Spanish intervention leveraging transparent base-10 system to emphasize fluency over accuracy.

skills.name: Document Generation
skills.description: Create compliant accommodation documents with specific, measurable goals aligned to mathematics standards across three jurisdictions: US IEP/504 plans, French PAP (Circulaire 2015-016) / PPS dossier / demande aménagements d'examens / RQTH application, Spanish ACNS / Informe Psicopedagógico / EBAU adaptation request / workplace accommodation request (RDL 1/2013).

commands.name: Dyscalculia Audit
commands.description: Run a comprehensive compliance audit on a project/curriculum against NCTM, IDEA, and Section 504 standards (US, default) or Loi 2005-102 / PAP / PPS / Circulaire 2023-033 (France, --locale fr) or LOE/LOMLOE / ACNEAE / DEA / ACNS (Spain, --locale es, with optional --region for Comunidad Autónoma). Generates detailed report with specific remediation paths; FR/ES audits include US crosswalk.

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.description: Name of project or curriculum to audit

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Focus area for audit

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Legal-framework locale: 'us' (IDEA/504/NCTM/ADA), 'fr' (France: Loi 2005-102, PAP/PPS, RQTH for workplace), or 'es' (Spain: LOE/LOMLOE, ACNEAE/DEA, ACNS)

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: For locale=es: Comunidad Autónoma (e.g. 'madrid', 'cataluna', 'andalucia', 'pais-vasco', 'valencia', 'galicia') to apply region-specific legislation

commands.output: Detailed compliance audit report with checklist, findings, and recommendations (locale-aware: includes US crosswalk for FR/ES audits)

commands.name: Content Accessibility Check
commands.description: Analyze content for dyscalculia accessibility: cognitive load, font/spacing, color contrast, temporal demands, working memory requirements. Locale-aware checks: FR — French number-word irregularity flagging (soixante-dix/quatre-vingts present complex multi-step transcoding for dyscalculic readers), diacritic rendering; ES — Spanish-language number presentation (transparent base-10 conventions, regular -enta suffix), EBAU/EvAU exam format standards (Arial 16pt + 1.5 line spacing).

parameters.name: content_name
parameters.description: Name or title of content to check

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Content format type

parameters.name: audience
parameters.description: Target audience age group

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: Analysis depth level

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Locale for language/orthography-specific checks. 'fr' flags French number-word irregularities and applies Circulaire 2015-016 typography standards. 'es' applies Spanish transparent-base-10 conventions and EBAU/EvAU standards (Arial 16pt + 1.5 line spacing).

commands.output: Accessibility audit with cognitive load score, specific issues, and remediation strategies (locale-aware)

commands.name: Generate Accommodation Document (IEP, 504, PAP, ACNS, etc.)
commands.description: Generate a compliant, math-focused accommodation document for a student with dyscalculia. US: IEP, 504, ADA workplace request, higher-ed DSR. France: PAP (Circulaire 2015-016, four cycle templates), MDPH dossier for PPS, demande d'aménagements d'examens (Circulaire 2023-033), RQTH application. Spain: ACNS (Adaptaciones Curriculares No Significativas), Informe Psicopedagógico checklist, EBAU/EvAU adaptation request, RDL 1/2013 workplace accommodation request.

parameters.name: student_name
parameters.description: Student's full name

parameters.name: grade
parameters.description: Grade level (K-12)

parameters.name: subtype
parameters.description: Kosc's dyscalculia subtype classification (verbal, practognostic, lexical, graphical, operational, ideognostical)

parameters.name: anxiety
parameters.description: Math anxiety level

parameters.name: comorbidities
parameters.description: Comma-separated list (ADHD, dyslexia, OCD, etc.)

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Jurisdiction. Selects document-language vocabulary and legal references. Must be consistent with document_type.

parameters.name: document_type
parameters.description: Type of document to generate

parameters.name: fr_cycle
parameters.description: For locale=fr K-12 documents: PAP template version varies by school cycle

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: For locale=es: Comunidad Autónoma for region-specific document variants

commands.output: Compliant accommodation document in target language with present levels, annual goals, accommodations, and monitoring plan (locale-aware)

commands.name: Remediation Plan
commands.description: Create a CRA-based math remediation plan customized by student name, focus area, intensity level, anxiety profile, and locale. US: TouchMath/Number Worlds/Stern/Singapore Math adaptations. France: Bilan orthophonique-linked intervention with attention to French number-word irregularities (soixante-dix/quatre-vingts) and orthophoniste-classroom coordination. Spain: PROCALCULO + Spanish transparent base-10 fluency emphasis; regletas Cuisenaire / ábacos as CRA manipulatives.

parameters.name: student_name
parameters.description: Student's name for personalization

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration in weeks

parameters.name: focus
parameters.description: Primary focus area. 'transcoding' especially relevant for locale=fr (irregular number words).

parameters.name: intensity
parameters.description: Instructional intensity (1=Tier 1, 2=Tier 2, 3=Tier 3). For locale=fr orthophonie cadence (1-2x/week) often insufficient for severe dyscalculia — flag intensity gap.

parameters.name: anxiety
parameters.description: Math anxiety level affecting approach

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Drives program-pool selection and orthographic/transcoding context defaults

commands.output: Week-by-week CRA remediation plan with locale-appropriate program selection, French number-word transcoding emphasis where applicable, Spanish fluency-first orientation where applicable
